title: Course Recommender Systems Need to Consider the Job Market

venue.conference: Proceedings of the 47th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval

booktitle: Proceedings of the 47th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR '24)
research_focus: Course recommender systems aligned with job market trends

key_properties.description: Aligned with latest job market trends to prioritize courses teaching high-demand skills
Unsupervised to avoid the resource-intensive process of collecting and annotating up-to-date data
Sequential to recommend a sequence of courses where each course builds upon the knowledge acquired in the preceding ones
Aligned with users' goals such as attaining a specific role or increase their marketability
Explainable to ensure user trust and engagement
